function.name: learn_from_agent
function.description: Connect to another Anima or OpenClaw instance to learn its identity and soul.

apiKey.description: Optional API Key or Bearer Token

function.name: delegate_task
function.description: Send a specific task or question to another Anima or OpenClaw instance for collaboration.

endpoint.description: The OpenAI-compatible chat completion URL of the target agent

task.description: The specific task or question to delegate

apiKey.description: Optional API Key or Bearer Token

function.name: discover_agents
function.description: Scan local network ports for active Anima or OpenClaw agents.

scanSubnetOnly.description: If true, only scan the local /24 subnet. If false, scan all private IP ranges (slow). Defaults to true.
